# Etra: Names & Cultures — ardrainic culture overrides
# Generated by generate_mod.py from config.yaml
# Each culture is reassigned to its own dialect for regional name variants.

# === ARDRAINIC CULTURES ===

	color = map_FRA
	tags = { french_gfx western_european_gfx european_gfx }

		human_group
		ardrainic_group
	}
}
